summary.para: The role management APIs are generally the preferred way to manage roles, rather than using file-based role management. The bulk create or update roles API cannot update roles that are defined in roles files.

If true (the default) then refresh the affected shards to make this operation visible to search, if wait_for then wait for a refresh to make this operation visible to search, if false then do nothing with refreshes.
A dictionary of role name to RoleDescriptor objects to add or update
